is a fictional character from Stage Evangelion Beyond stage play.

Profile

He is the pilot of the Evangelion γ. He adores Toma Kano, who always helps him out in various ways. Theatre cocoon Evangelion Beyond p.39 

History

Stage Evangelion Beyond

Trivia

The character portrayed by Mizuki Itagaki was initially named , the name was later changed.
Tan Hazumi was initially going to be portrayed by Nijirō Murakami, before being recasted by Mizuki Itagaki.
